description_long: This lounge set consists of a three-seater sofa, two single armchairs, and a rectangular coffee table, all arranged in a conversational grouping. The seating pieces feature thick, light gray cushions on both the seat and back, supported by a sturdy, dark metal frame with angular, modern lines. The armrests are straight and integrated into the frame, providing a minimalist yet functional design. The coffee table has a matching dark metal frame and a flat, solid tabletop, ideal for placing drinks or small items. The overall aesthetic is contemporary, with clean lines and a neutral color palette suitable for urban parks, patios, or communal outdoor spaces. The materials and construction suggest durability and comfort for public or semi-public environments.
description: A modern lounge set with a three-seater sofa, two armchairs, and a rectangular coffee table, featuring light gray cushions and dark metal frames in a clean, angular design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full three-seater sofa, both armchairs angled inward, and the coffee table centered between them.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the sofa and armchairs, with the coffee table's rectangular shape clearly visible.
description_view_2: Rear view of the sofa with the backs of the armchairs and the coffee table in the foreground.
description_view_3: Angled view showing the sofa's side profile, both armchairs, and the coffee table's top surface.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three seat and three back cushions on the sofa, one seat and one back cushion on each armchair; all cushions are rectangular, loose, and evenly spaced.
attribute_backrest_design: Straight, medium-height backrests with flat, rectangular cushions; no tufting or segmentation, simple and modern.
attribute_armrest_presence: Present; straight, flat, metal armrests integrated into the frame, medium height.
attribute_leg_style: Angled, thick metal legs forming part of the frame, extending outward for stability; no decorative features, industrial look.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid light gray fabric with a smooth, untextured appearance; no visible patterns, tufting, or decorative stitching.
